contestName: ICPC 武汉全国邀请赛暨湖北省赛

blocks.text: Given a directed acyclic graph G with n vertices and m edges, and a color sequence a1, a2, · · ·, an of length n, where ai denotes the initial color of vertex i. Let Si denote the set of all vertices reachable from vertex i in graph G (including vertex i itself). Now, you need to process q operations in order. The operations are of the following two types:

items: Given x and y, change the color ax of vertex x to y.
Given x, query the number of distinct colors among all vertices reachable from vertex x. That is, find the size of the set {aj | j ∈ Sx }.

blocks.text: The first line contains two integers n, m (1 ≤ n ≤ 1.5 × $10^{5}$, 0 ≤ m ≤ 3 × $10^{5}$ ), representing the number of vertices and the number of edges in the graph, respectively. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, · · ·, an (1 ≤ ai ≤ n), representing the initial color of each vertex.

The next m lines each contain two integers u, v (1 ≤ u, v ≤ n), indicating that there is a directed edge from u to v in graph G. It is guaranteed that graph G is a directed acyclic graph (DAG) and contains no multiple edges. The next line contains an integer q (1 ≤ q ≤ 1.5 × $10^{5}$ ), representing the total number of operations. The next q lines each describe an operation in one of the following two formats:

items: 1 x y: Represents an update operation, changing the color ax to y (1 ≤ x, y ≤ n).
2 x: Represents a query operation, querying the number of distinct colors reachable from vertex x (1 ≤ x ≤ n).

blocks.text: For each operation of the second type, output a single line containing an integer representing the answer to the query.
给定一个n个点m条边的有向无环图G，以及一个长度为n的颜色序列a1,a2,···,an，其中ai表示点i的初始颜色。记Si表示在图G上从点i出发能够到达的所有点构成的集合（包括点i自身）。现在需要依次处理q次操作，操作分为以下两种：

items: 给定x和y，将点x的颜色ax修改为y。
给定x，查询从点x出发能够到达的所有点中，一共有多少种不同的颜色。即求集合{aj|j∈Sx}的大小。

blocks.text: 第一行包含两个整数n,m（1≤n≤1.5×$10^{5}$，0≤m≤3×$10^{5}$），分别表示图的节点数和边数。第二行包含n个整数a1,a2,···,an（1≤ai≤n），表示每个节点的初始颜色。接下来m行，每行包含两个整数u,v（1≤u,v≤n），表示图G中存在一条从u指向v的有向边。保证图G是一个有向无环图，且不存在重边。接下来一行包含一个整数q（1≤q≤1.5×$10^{5}$），表示操作的总次数。接下来q行，每行描述一次操作，格式为以下两种之一：

items: 1 x y：表示一次修改操作，将ax的颜色修改为y（1≤x,y≤n）。
2 x：表示一次查询操作，查询从点x（1≤x≤n）出发能到达的颜色种类数。

blocks.text: 对于每个第二种操作，输出一行包含一个整数，表示对应查询的答案。
